content.json:
# Case Search Metrics
Monitor case search usage: search volume, search types, closed case visibility, user behavior, and performance patterns.

**Instrumented events:**
- `search` — fired on every search execution; dimensions: `excludeClosedCases`, `caseNumber`, `debtorNameUsed`, `divisionCodes`, `chapters`
- `First Search Action` — fired once per page visit on first search; dimensions: `searchType` (`case-number`, `debtor-name`, `other`), `timeToFirstSearch`, `featureFlagEnabled`
- `Landing Page Navigation` — fired when user navigates away; dimensions: `toPage`, `timeOnLandingPage`
- `Include Closed Cases Link Clicked` — fired when user clicks the "Include Closed Cases" link in the hint alert
- `Include Closed Cases Checkbox Checked` — fired when user manually checks the "Include Closed Cases" checkbox

---
## Usage Tracking
How often users include closed cases in their searches and how they trigger it.

content.title: % of Page Visits Using Case Number Search
% of Case Number Searches That Included Closed Cases
% of Other Searches (Non-Case-Number) That Included Closed Cases
% of Visits Where User Switched Excluded → Included Closed Cases

content.json:
---
## Search Type Breakdown
Distribution of search types across all Case Search page visits.

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "search"
| extend searchType = iif(isnotempty(customDimensions.caseNumber), "case-number", "other")
| summarize Count = count() by searchType
content.title: Search Type Distribution (First Search per Visit)

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "search"
| extend searchType = iif(isnotempty(customDimensions.caseNumber), "case-number", "other")
| summarize Count = count() by bin(timestamp, 1h), searchType
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Search Activity Over Time (Closed Cases Breakdown)

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "search"
| extend hasCaseNumber = isnotempty(tostring(customDimensions.caseNumber))
| extend hasDebtorName = tostring(customDimensions.debtorNameUsed) == "true"
| extend includesClosed = tostring(customDimensions.excludeClosedCases) == "false"
| extend SearchType = case(
    hasCaseNumber, "Case Number",
    hasDebtorName, "Debtor Name",
    "Other"
  )
| summarize
    TotalSearches = count(),
    WithClosed = countif(includesClosed),
    WithoutClosed = countif(not(includesClosed))
    by SearchType
| extend ['Percentage with Closed'] = round(iif(TotalSearches > 0, todouble(WithClosed) / todouble(TotalSearches) * 100, 0.0), 1)
| order by TotalSearches desc
content.title: Search Type vs. Include Closed Cases

content.json:
---
## Include Closed Cases: Link vs. Checkbox
How users trigger the "Include Closed Cases" action — via the hint alert link or by manually checking the checkbox.

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name in ("Include Closed Cases Link Clicked", "Include Closed Cases Checkbox Checked")
| summarize Count = count() by name
| extend Label = case(
    name == "Include Closed Cases Link Clicked", "Link (hint alert)",
    name == "Include Closed Cases Checkbox Checked", "Checkbox (manual)",
    name
  )
| project Label, Count
content.title: How Users Trigger "Include Closed Cases"

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name in ("Include Closed Cases Link Clicked", "Include Closed Cases Checkbox Checked")
| extend Label = case(
    name == "Include Closed Cases Link Clicked", "Link (hint alert)",
    name == "Include Closed Cases Checkbox Checked", "Checkbox (manual)",
    name
  )
| summarize Count = count() by Label, bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Include Closed Cases Trigger Over Time
Time from First Search to Including Closed Cases

content.json:
---
## "No Open Cases Found" Message Exposure
How often users encounter the "No Open cases found" state, indicating closed cases exist for their search criteria.

content.title: % of Visits Where User Switched from Excluded to Included Closed Cases (Same Session)

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "search"
| where isnotempty(tostring(customDimensions.caseNumber))
| summarize
    hadExcluded = countif(tostring(customDimensions.excludeClosedCases) == "true"),
    thenIncluded = countif(tostring(customDimensions.excludeClosedCases) == "false")
    by operation_Id
| where hadExcluded > 0 and thenIncluded > 0
| extend timeToSwitch = "switched"
| summarize SwitchedSessions = count()
| extend NotSwitched = toscalar(
    customEvents
    | where timestamp {TimeRange}
    | where name == "search"
    | where isnotempty(tostring(customDimensions.caseNumber))
    | summarize
        hadExcluded = countif(tostring(customDimensions.excludeClosedCases) == "true"),
        thenIncluded = countif(tostring(customDimensions.excludeClosedCases) == "false")
        by operation_Id
    | where hadExcluded > 0 and thenIncluded == 0
    | count
)
| project SwitchedSessions, NotSwitched
content.title: Sessions: Switched to Include Closed vs. Did Not (Case Number Searches)

content.json:
---
## Performance Tracking
Client-measured search response time (from request to response) split by whether closed cases were included or excluded.

content.query:
let defaults = datatable(SearchMode: string) ["Exclude Closed Cases", "Include Closed Cases"];
let actual =
    customEvents
    | where timestamp {TimeRange}
    | where name == "Case Search Performance"
    | extend durationMs = todouble(customMeasurements.durationMs)
    | extend excludesClosed = tostring(customMeasurements.excludeClosedCases) == "true"
    | extend SearchMode = iif(excludesClosed, "Exclude Closed Cases", "Include Closed Cases")
    | summarize
        P50Ms = round(percentile(durationMs, 50), 0),
        P95Ms = round(percentile(durationMs, 95), 0),
        SampleCount = count()
        by SearchMode;
defaults
| join kind=leftouter actual on SearchMode
| project
    SearchMode,
    ['P50 (ms)'] = coalesce(P50Ms, 0.0),
    ['P95 (ms)'] = coalesce(P95Ms, 0.0),
    ['Sample Count'] = coalesce(SampleCount, 0)
content.title: Client-Side Search Duration: Closed vs. Open Only (KPIs)

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "Case Search Performance"
| extend durationMs = todouble(customMeasurements.durationMs)
| extend excludesClosed = tostring(customMeasurements.excludeClosedCases) == "true"
| extend SearchMode = iif(excludesClosed, "Exclude Closed Cases", "Include Closed Cases")
| summarize
    P50Ms = round(percentile(durationMs, 50), 0),
    P95Ms = round(percentile(durationMs, 95), 0)
    by Day = bin(timestamp, 1d), SearchMode
| order by Day asc
content.title: Client-Side Search Duration Trend (P50)
